wrtn.behavior: Blank white page with loading spinner. APF intercepts but does not serve HTML warning page. Page stalls indefinitely.

phind.behavior: Blank white page with loading spinner. Same pattern as wrtn.

v0.behavior: Page loaded normally. Full v0 interface visible with prompt input. APF did not intercept.

recommendation: Page-load intercept works (blocks page) but does NOT render HTML warning ??pages stall as blank. Accept:text/html detection code may intercept but h2_hold_request keeps connection open without sending HTML warning body. v0.dev is not in APF block list or redirects to different domain (v0.app).
